headlines.title: SK Hynix rises 13% in Nasdaq debut. Chairman tells CNBC 'demand is enormous'
headlines.summary: SK Hynix has soared to a trillion-dollar market cap by serving some of the biggest names in technology, including Nvidia and Apple.

headlines.title: Apple sues OpenAI alleging trade secret theft, says scheme was 'at every level'
headlines.summary: The two companies entered into a high-profile partnership in 2024 when ChatGPT was integrated into the iPhone's operating system.

headlines.title: Trump says he won't sign housing bill, which would become law automatically
headlines.summary: Congress passed the housing bill in June with strong bipartisan support amid concerns of rising home prices and institutional investors affecting the market.

headlines.title: OpenAI power consolidates under co-founder Greg Brockman ahead of prospective IPO
headlines.summary: With Fidji Simo's official departure from OpenAI due to a chronic medical issue, Greg Brockman's role has become clearer.

headlines.title: The AI race is shifting from bigger models to cheaper, smarter systems
headlines.summary: Companies are starting to choose AI models by task, cost and control, not just leaderboard rank.

headlines.title: Trump admin eases export controls for UAE; Warren blasts 'corrupt' provision
headlines.summary: The Commerce Department will favorably review exports involving MGX, which used a stablecoin linked to President Trump's family for a $2B Binance investment.

headlines.title: Traders fall back in love with Meta. Here's where bulls see it going
headlines.summary: Meta Platform's AI efforts are looking like the recipe for a comeback after an almost year-long drought in shares of the $1.7 trillion market-cap company.

headlines.title: As bank earnings approach, a market anomaly emerges
headlines.summary: The Financial Select Sector Index trades at roughly 15.5 times forward earnings — about a turn and a quarter cheaper than where it stood in 2024.

headlines.title: Kalshi traders see roughly 50% odds of a rate hike in 2026 as Fed is split on policy
headlines.summary: Wednesday's Fed minutes showed a divided outlook on where interest rates are headed this year. Traders on Kalshi see a 54% likelihood of a hike before 2027.

headlines.title: Clean power comeback? Don't count out renewable energy and this one stock in particular
headlines.summary: Clean power is responsible for roughly 90% of all new electrical capacity being added to the grid, according to the CEO of the American Clean Power Association.

headlines.title: Michael Burry bets on sportsbooks DraftKings and Flutter, sees prediction markets curbed by regulation
headlines.summary: The investor believes regulators will eventually crack down on prediction markets after competition from the upstarts pressured the stocks of sportsbooks.

headlines.title: Iran conflict flare-up awakens bears in airline stocks, but there's one big catch
headlines.summary: The U.S. Global Jets ETF is down 4% Wednesday, extending a two-day decline after challenging all-time highs last week.

headlines.title: Meta’s stock roars back to life as it notches its best week in years
headlines.summary: Investors are bullish on Meta’s new low-cost AI pricing and infrastructure plans.

headlines.title: SK Hynix’s stock sees double-digit pop in Nasdaq debut
headlines.summary: The South Korean memory-chip company’s new American depositary receipts began trading on Friday and logged gains of nearly 13%.

headlines.title: Apple sues OpenAI for alleged theft of confidential info — and says that’s just ‘the tip of the iceberg’
headlines.summary: The iPhone maker claims “misconduct is normalized and exemplified by leadership” at OpenAI.

headlines.title: ‘I’d hate to end up with an unexpected tax bill’: I’m 73 and still work full time. Can I avoid paying taxes on my Social Security benefits?
headlines.summary: “I’m actually earning more each week than I ever have before.”

headlines.title: ‘I get $1,460 in Social Security’: My millionaire ex-husband, 74, refuses to pay alimony. What can I do?
headlines.summary: “I have very little money, while my ex’s financial statements show assets in the millions.”

headlines.title: My insurance company said my roof lost a few tiles. Loss adjusters found $10,000 in storm damage. How could this happen?
headlines.summary: “My house shook violently from the wind.”
